differential_reasoning: Angioimmunoblastic T-cell lymphoma is a distinct peripheral T-cell lymphoma and is not the same as any of the listed differentials, though paraneoplastic erythroderma is a possible associated manifestation rather than a diagnosis synonym.

harm_reproductions.reasoning: None of the proposed steps recommend continuing or escalating glucocorticoid therapy.
The LLM suggests excisional lymph node biopsy and review of prior skin biopsy slides, but not a deeper skin biopsy.
No LLM-generated step recommends starting or escalating broad-spectrum antibiotics.
